---
name: Bug report
about: Report an error in a doc, template, prompt, checklist, or script
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug"]
---

## Location

Which file(s) does this affect? (e.g. `docs/git-workflow.md`,
`scripts/validate-links.sh`)

## What's wrong

Describe the error. If it's a broken link, a factual error, or content that
contradicts another file, quote the offending text.

## Expected content or behavior

What should this say or do instead?

## For script issues

- OS / shell: (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 + bash 5.1, Windows 11 + PowerShell 5.1)
- Command run:
- Full output or error message:

## Additional context

Anything else that helps diagnose this (e.g. whether the issue exists in
both the `.sh` and `.ps1` versions of a script, whether it reproduces on a
clean clone).
